title: Virtual Machine references an uninitialized register
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER, y VARCHAR(255), z FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY(x, y));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX t2x ON t2(x);
INSERT INTO t2(x, y, z) VALUES (NULL, 'test', 3.14);
UPDATE t2 SET y='updated' WHERE x IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Virtual Machine references an uninitialized register
